title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Baxter International is seeking a Pharmacy Technician to support our remote pharmacy operations serving healthcare facilities nationwide. You will prepare and dispense medications, manage pharmacy inventory, ensure regulatory compliance, and coordinate with healthcare providers to ensure patients receive their medications on schedule.
responsibilities: Prepare medications according to pharmacist-verified prescriptions
Manage pharmacy inventory and coordinate with suppliers
Enter prescription information into pharmacy management systems
Perform quality checks on compounded medications
Communicate with patients and healthcare providers regarding prescriptions
Maintain detailed records for DEA and state pharmacy compliance

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; pharmacy technician program completion required or in-progress

benefits: Paid time off and healthcare discount programs
